value.found_quote: Prompt injection detection: opt-in screenshot scanning to detect hidden adversarial instructions.
value.rationale: The page does not describe a "Security scanning / threat model" feature that scans code or agent actions against a defined threat model. The closest related feature mentioned is "Prompt injection detection" — opt-in screenshot scanning to detect hidden adversarial instructions — which is about detecting prompt injection attacks, not scanning code/agent actions against a security threat model. The page also mentions configurable safety policies and a safety decision system, but none of these constitute scanning code or agent actions against a threat model as described in the claim.
